Interface SessionDao

public interface SessionDao
JDBI DAO for the mc_sessions table. Handles persistence for player session login/logout data.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static final record 
    SessionDao.SessionRow
    Internal data transfer object for JDBI mapping.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    close(int sessionId, long quitAt, long duration)
    Closes an active session.
    Optional<SessionDao.SessionRow>
    findById(int sessionId)
    Finds a session row by its unique ID.
    List<SessionDao.SessionRow>
    findByUuid(String uuid)
    Finds all session rows for a player.
    Optional<SessionDao.SessionRow>
    findOpenByUuid(String uuid)
    Finds the currently open session for a player.
    int
    insert(String uuid, long joinedAt, Long quitAt, long duration)
    Inserts a complete session record.
    int
    open(String uuid, long joinedAt)
    Opens a new session for a player.
    void
    update(int sessionId, Long quitAt, long duration)
    Updates an existing session record.

  • Method Details

    • findById

      Optional<SessionDao.SessionRow> findById(int sessionId)
      Finds a session row by its unique ID.
      Parameters:
      sessionId - the session ID
      Returns:
      an optional session row

    • findByUuid

      List<SessionDao.SessionRow> findByUuid(String uuid)
      Finds all session rows for a player.
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID as a string
      Returns:
      a list of session rows

    • findOpenByUuid

      Optional<SessionDao.SessionRow> findOpenByUuid(String uuid)
      Finds the currently open session for a player.
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID as a string
      Returns:
      an optional session row

    • insert

      int insert(String uuid, long joinedAt, Long quitAt, long duration)
      Inserts a complete session record.
      Parameters:
      uuid - player UUID
      joinedAt - join timestamp
      quitAt - quit timestamp
      duration - session duration
      Returns:
      the generated session ID

    • update

      void update(int sessionId, Long quitAt, long duration)
      Updates an existing session record.
      Parameters:
      sessionId - the session ID
      quitAt - quit timestamp
      duration - session duration

    • open

      int open(String uuid, long joinedAt)
      Opens a new session for a player.
      Parameters:
      uuid - player UUID
      joinedAt - join timestamp
      Returns:
      the generated session ID

    • close

      void close(int sessionId, long quitAt, long duration)
      Closes an active session.
      Parameters:
      sessionId - the session ID
      quitAt - quit timestamp
      duration - total duration
